title: The Utah Blanket Wars
byline: By Kyle Killen, founder — the expedition's first human byline
thesis: Two luxury-blanket brands fighting each other on Utah freeway billboards are a live field study in tribal cognition — the same failure modes the machine pieces dissect, observed in the wild at seventy miles an hour.
description: The human-cognition mirror to the type specimen. The central field observation — that one brand pivoted its imagery in answer to the other — rests on the founder's own eyewitness record and could not be independently sourced; the piece either brings the photographs home or prints that uncertainty openly. An expedition that reports a sighting it cannot document says so on the tag.
